---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for Pekis
title: "[Feature]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem Statement

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred approach.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative ideas or workarounds you considered.

## User Impact

Who benefits from this change, and how?

## Technical Notes

If relevant, note affected areas such as CloudKit, onboarding, notifications, Word Search matchmaking, or local caching.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, or related issues here.
